raw: {"questions":[{"label":"Current work landscape","name":"What's been most on your mind at work lately?","description":"A general check-in to allow Carl to set the agenda or highlight pressing issues.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Leadership readiness","name":"What about leading a team excites you the most?","description":"Explores Carl's intrinsic motivation for leadership roles.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"engagement","delta":3}]},{"label":"Delegation comfort","name":"How comfortable are you with delegating tasks currently?","description":"Assesses Carl's readiness and comfort with delegating work effectively.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":1}]},{"label":"Communication for leadership","name":"What do you think is key in communicating effectively as a team leader?","description":"Probes Carl's understanding of essential communication skills for leadership.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Understanding expectations","name":"What do you believe are the key expectations for a team lead role?","description":"Surfaces Carl's clarity on what is expected in a team lead position.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Impact through leadership","name":"How would leading the team amplify your impact?","description":"Explores how Carl envisions increasing his influence through leadership.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Current priority clarity","name":"What are your top priorities this week, and why?","description":"Checks Carl's alignment on current work priorities.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"clarity","delta":3}]},{"label":"Role stretch","name":"What part of the team lead role do you think will stretch you the most?","description":"Identifies which aspects of the team lead role Carl expects to be most challenging.","purpose":"topic","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]},{"label":"Energy and sustainability","name":"How's your energy holding up with the current workload?","description":"Evaluates Carl's current energy levels and workload sustainability.","purpose":"wellbeing","axis_effects":[{"axis":"wellbeing","delta":3}]},{"label":"Future learning areas","name":"What new skills or knowledge do you feel you need to develop for the team lead role?","description":"Identifies areas Carl feels he needs to grow in to prepare for a leadership role.","purpose":"competency","axis_effects":[{"axis":"growth","delta":3}]}]}
